extra.message: Consider using TLS instead of SSL (ssl.PROTOCOL_SSLv23 used in ssl.SSLContext).

Calling extractall to extract all files from a tar file without sanitization. This may result files outside destination directory to be overwritten, resulting in an arbitrary file write.

xml.etree.ElementTree.fromstring is vulnerable to XXE and DDOS in versions of python <= 3.10. If using python runtime 3.10 or older, consider upgrading python versions, or see https://docs.python.org/3.10/library/xml.html#xml-vulnerabilities for mitigations. Python versions 3.11 and onwards do not have this issue.

Python versions 3.11 and onwards do not have this issue.

Unsanitized input from an event listener flows into a member access and is used to access a property of this object by name. This may allow a malicious user to pollute the Object.prototype and cause a crash, remote code execution or logic bypasses.

Cookie's HttpOnly flag is set to False by default. Set it to true to protect the cookie from possible malicious code on client side.
